title: PLUS PLUS Building Blocks Toy Storage Case - Holds 100 Pieces - Kids Construction Toys, Learning Resources, STEM Play for Home and Travel - Travel Case
features: PLUS PLUS STORAGE - Easy storage at home or on the go. The BIG case is designed for Plus Plus BIG pieces for little ones. The travel case holds 15 BIG pieces and is ideal for taking to restaurants on flights or in the car
COMPACT AND PORTABLE - Not only are they a perfect toy to play with at home, but Plus Plus BIG are ideal travel toys to pack up and take on the go to keep your little one entertained anywhere

STIMULATE AND ENGAGE - Fine motor skills toys are excellent autism sensory equipment to engage and stimulate. The kids toys set is easy to pack into the travel case to grab and take with you on the go
EASY TO CLEAN - The STEM toys are BPA-and phthalate-free and can be easily washed in a washing machine or dishwasher, ensuring hygienic play with BIG Plus Plus blocks. Cases can be wiped clean

HIGH-QUALITY CRAFTMANSHIP - Ensuring the highest standards and safety, our blocks are designed and made in Denmark and tested to EU safety standards. Fun and creative boys and girls birthday presents and toys for boys and girls
description: Product Description Plus-Plus is a collection of colourful 6-sided plastic pieces that interlock with one another to provide the user with endless possibilities. It can be used to create puzzles, 2D and 3D mosaics and art, or used as a block to construct anything imaginable. Plus-Plus is simple, solid, and pleasing to use and comes in a vast array of beautiful colours. Handy different-sized cases make storing Plus Plus super easy. Plus-Plus combines science, tech, mathematics, and engineering (STEM) elements. It stimulates fine motor skills, logic, creativity, and imagination, all without the use of screens. It's hours of fun and play for all ages. Some Plus-Plus products come with inspirational building guides, but we encourage open play as we believe this is the best way to connect with your inner creative genius. The perfect girls and boys toys age 3 and over. Imaginative builds as girls and boys toys age 8 and over. Creative toys for 3+ year old girls and boys. The colourful blocks make the perfect 5 year old girls gifts. Safety Warning Toy Inside. Adult supervision required
